global_goal: Expand the existing Adeptus Testus Facility into a deterministic facility-operations simulator while preserving baseline behavior.

must_preserve: facility has exactly the seven required rooms
Sarah starts the default scenario at 08:00 in Dormitory
Sarah does not require sleep by 09:00 in the default scenario
default deterministic scenario advances through at least 12:00
renderer lists all rooms and marks Sarah's current room
invalid rooms or invalid movement fail predictably

global_constraints: standard-library runtime only unless explicitly justified and reviewed
no GUI, curses, terminal color dependency, database, network service, authentication, game engine, or image generation
do not modify installed Adeptus skill files
do not delete or rewrite prior .adeptus/runs audit artifacts
after strategic pre-review, use bounded packets rather than full intake, full strategic plan, full workflow, full installed SKILL.md, full project tree, or old run artifacts
controller repair boundary applies to all product-file repairs

product_repair_route: create or update a bounded repair packet for the affected story
invoke Enginseer Implementer for product-file repair
require Inquisitor Gatekeeper review of repaired story output
rerun validation only after implementation repair and review

final_required: cleanup evidence from adeptus_pytest or adeptus_cleanup_runtime_artifacts
final check for no .pytest_cache, __pycache__, .pyc, .pyo, .pytest-tmp*, .adeptus_pytest_tmp*, pytest-*, or tmp_pytest_* outside protected .adeptus/runs artifacts
